html:
Exclusive to:

Snakeskin Rug is a craftable Turf introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 2 Snakeskins and 1 Cloth to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

During the Monsoon Season, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. However, expanding Puddles can still flood this Turf. Like all other crafted Turfs, Lureplants and their Eye Plants will not spawn on Snakeskin Rug. Like on Jungle Turf, Parrots can spawn on it.

Unlike Wooden Flooring, plants can be planted on Snakeskin Rug.

Trivia

  • Snakeskin Rug was introduced in the Wilbur Vs. the Volcano update.
  • The item's crafting description may be a reference to the movie The Big Lebowski where the protagonist exclaims to a bunch of thugs that one of his most prized possessions is his rug which he claims, "It really ties the room together."

Gallery

  • Snakeskin Rug texture.
  • A patch of Snakeskin Rug placed on a Beach.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

During the Monsoon Season, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. However, expanding Puddles can still flood this Turf. Like all other crafted Turfs, Lureplants and their Eye Plants will not spawn on Snakeskin Rug. Like on Jungle Turf, Parrots can spawn on it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thảm Da Rắn là một loại Đất chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó cần 2 Da Rắn và 1 Vải để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.
title: Snakeskin Rug

'''Snakeskin Rug''' is a craftable [[Turfs|Turf]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires 2 [[Snakeskin]]s and 1 [[Cloth]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype.

During the [[Monsoon Season]], this Turf will not spawn [[Flooding|Puddles]]. However, expanding Puddles can still flood this Turf. Like all other crafted Turfs, [[Meat Bulb (Lureplant)|Lureplants]] and their Eye Plants will not spawn on Snakeskin Rug. Like on [[Jungle Turf]], [[Parrot|Parrots]] can spawn on it.

Unlike [[Wooden Flooring]], plants can be planted on Snakeskin Rug.

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Snakeskin Rug was introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#February 4th, 2016 - Wilbur Vs. The Volcano Update|Wilbur Vs. the Volcano]]'' update.
* The item's crafting description may be a reference to the movie ''[[Wikipedia:The_Big_Lebowski|The Big Lebowski]]'' where the protagonist exclaims to a bunch of thugs that one of his most prized possessions is his rug which he claims, "It really ties the room together."
